name: debugger
title: Debugger
description: Use this OS skill for runtime debugging across browser behavior, deployment logs, error tracking, analytics, and code evidence. Invoke it for bug triage, incidents, post-merge validation, frontend regressions, worker or queue issues, telephony flows, observability checks, and reconciling runtime truth with code assumptions.
